author: jurrejan
text:
category: ui-swift

Requires significant refactor:
1. Add @FocusState to all dialog views
2. Add focusedIndex state variable
3. Pass isFocused to SwiftUIChoiceCard
4. Add .focusable() and arrow key handlers
5. Handle Enter/Space to select

This is cross-cutting - affects 5+ views. Better as dedicated session.

author: jurrejan
text: category: ui-swift\n\nBACKLOG: StyledTextField is AppKit NSView with custom draw(). Animating focus ring requires Core Animation layer-based approach or NSAnimationContext. Low value for 0.12s transition. Defer unless user prioritizes.

author: jurrejan
text: category: ui-swift\n\nREVIEWED: The selection indicator (checkbox/radio) serves a functional purpose - it communicates whether multi-select is allowed. Removing it would hurt usability. The blue highlight + indicator is a common pattern in modern UIs. Closing as won't-fix unless user disagrees.
